comment: Halcyon price relay — devnet config. Copy to devnet.json and fill in keypair_path + shard_id.
_shard_id_doc: Shard ID produces deterministic PriceUpdateV2 account addresses: PDA = findProgramAddress([shard_id_u16_le, feed_id_hex_32], receiver_program). Halcyon uses shard 7 to keep our addresses distinct from the 3000+ other devnet writers who claimed shard 0.
_staleness_doc: If the on-chain publish_time is within this many seconds of the latest Hermes publish_time, the relay skips the post. Saves tx fees when nothing has changed.
_cache_doc: Relay-side historical cache. One append-only CSV per feed under cache_dir. Used for future sigma/regression inputs, not by the relay itself.
